creator: freebsd-ports@jan0sch.de
text:
Hi,

On Sat, 8 Jan 2011 05:09:30 GMT
mezz@FreeBSD.org wrote:

MO> I am not able to decode the base64 for some reason to get your
MO> make.log.gz. But a lot of us can't reproduce your issue. Did you
MO> upgrade Python? If you did, did you follow in
MO> the /usr/ports/UPDATING?

sorry for that. I figured it out with help from wenheping@gmail.com.
Somewhere in my shell config PYTHONPATH was set. After removing that
everything worked fine.

Regards,

Jens
